$comment: FC14 (D-PP-CONDITIONAL-COMPILATION) runtime witness: #if/#ifdef/#ifndef/#elif/#else/#endif + the `defined` operator select the right branch and elide the wrong ones. MODE==2 takes the #elif (BASE=40), the #if-0 block containing `return 99` is elided, #ifdef BASE + the defined() chain set MARGIN=2; add(40,2)=42 -> exit 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: a wrong elision leaves `return 99` live (exit 99) or an undefined identifier (link failure); a wrong #elif pick changes BASE. BASE/MARGIN reach add() as function args so the baseline arm keeps a live runtime add (not const-folded), and the optimizedPipelines `release` arm runs the shipped pipeline over the same source.
